# Crew Index

**53 agents**, generated from `catalog/agents.tsv`. Every row here is a real file under `.claude/agents/<category>/`, validated by `scripts/factory/validate-all.sh` (0 orphans in either direction).

## core (6)

| Agent | Type | Model | Fires when |
|---|---|---|---|
| `planner` | brain | `inherit` | start of any multi-step build/feature/refactor request |
| `backend-dev` | doer | `sonnet` | server, API, database, or script implementation |
| `frontend-dev` | doer | `sonnet` | UI, component, style, or client-state implementation |
| `error-checker` | gate | `sonnet` | every task, always — runs tests, lint, build |
| `security-auditor` | gate | `sonnet` | every task, always — secrets, injection, authz |
| `frontend-reviewer` | gate | `sonnet` | whenever UI/frontend files were touched |

## extended (9)

| Agent | Type | Model | Fires when |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api-designer` | brain | `inherit` | a task creates or changes an API surface |
| `test-writer` | doer | `sonnet` | test-gap tasks and behavior-lock before a refactor |
| `db-specialist` | doer | `sonnet` | schema, migration, or query-layer tasks |
| `devops-engineer` | doer | `sonnet` | Dockerfile, CI/CD, or environment-handling tasks |
| `refactor-specialist` | doer | `sonnet` | refactor tasks (requires passing behavior-lock tests first) |
| `docs-writer` | doer | `haiku` | documentation tasks sourced from changelogs and code |
| `performance-auditor` | gate | `sonnet` | config-enabled or task tagged perf |
| `accessibility-auditor` | gate | `sonnet` | config-enabled or task tagged a11y |
| `dependency-auditor` | gate | `haiku` | whenever a dependency manifest or lockfile changed |
